# Story 2.3: Option Modal + Option Chips + Add to Cart

Status: done

<!-- Generated by bmad-create-story workflow on 2026-05-11. -->

## Story

As a cashier,
I want chọn size, đá, đường, topping và ghi chú cho sản phẩm có tùy chọn qua modal nhanh và rõ ràng,
so that tôi không nhầm lẫn order phức tạp như "Bạc Xỉu size L, ít đá, 50% đường, thêm topping" trong giờ cao điểm — đây là defining interaction của Café POS MVP.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. **OptionModal mở từ ProductTile và hiển thị đầy đủ cấu hình:** Given product có `optionGroupIds`, when cashier click/tap ProductTile, then `OptionModal` mở bằng Radix Dialog với header tên sản phẩm + giá preview; danh sách option groups theo `sortOrder` (Size → Đá → Đường → Topping); group label rõ với indicator bắt buộc; mỗi option render bằng `OptionChip`; modal có focus trap, heading rõ, Esc đóng nếu draft chưa thay đổi đáng kể, và focus return về ProductTile gốc.
2. **Validation nhóm bắt buộc/minSelect:** Given option group `isRequired=true` hoặc `minSelect>0`, when cashier chưa chọn đủ option trong group, then group có visual indicator `Bắt buộc`, helper text `Chọn {tên group} để tiếp tục`, nút `Thêm vào giỏ` disabled, và group thiếu được highlight rõ không chỉ bằng màu.
3. **maxSelect enforcement:** Given option group có `minSelect/maxSelect` (vd Topping `minSelect=0, maxSelect=3`), when cashier chọn vượt `maxSelect`, then chip mới không toggle on; hiển thị feedback ngắn inline hoặc toast `Tối đa 3 topping`; state hiện tại không bị mất.
4. **OptionChip selected state + price preview:** Given OptionChip có `priceDeltaVnd ≠ 0`, when cashier toggle chip, then selected state nổi bật bằng border + check icon/label (không chỉ màu), price delta hiển thị inline (vd `+5.000 ₫` hoặc `-5.000 ₫`), và preview giá item cập nhật trong <100ms bằng `product.priceVnd + sum(selected.priceDeltaVnd)`.
5. **Single vs multi select semantics:** Given group có `maxSelect=1`, when cashier chọn option khác trong cùng group, then selection thay thế option cũ. Given group có `maxSelect>1`, when cashier toggle option đã chọn, then option được bỏ chọn nếu vẫn thỏa `minSelect`/required rule. Screen reader đọc chip role `radio` cho single-select required group, `checkbox` cho multi-select; group có `role="group"` và `aria-label` tên group.
6. **Default option initialization:** Given option groups có option `isDefault=true`, when modal mở lần đầu, then draft selection preselect default option hợp lệ cho group tương ứng; nếu không có default cho required single-select, không tự chọn bừa và giữ disabled CTA cho đến khi cashier chọn.
7. **Ghi chú item:** Given input ghi chú trong modal, when cashier nhập `ít đường, không đá`, then note lưu vào draft cart item, max length 200 ký tự, placeholder đúng `Ghi chú (tùy chọn)`, và không dùng `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` để render nội dung note.
8. **Add-to-cart snapshot contract:** Given cấu hình option hợp lệ và cashier bấm `Thêm vào giỏ`, when action triggered, then modal đóng; cart store nhận item snapshot đầy đủ `{ tempId, productId, productNameSnapshot, unitPriceSnapshot, options: [{ optionId, labelSnapshot, priceDeltaSnapshot }], note?, quantity: 1, lineTotal }`; `lineTotal = unitPriceSnapshot + sum(priceDeltaSnapshot)`; focus return về ProductTile gốc.
9. **Cart integration seam safe for Story 2.4:** Given Story 2.4 sẽ hoàn thiện CartPanel, when Story 2.3 thêm item, then tối thiểu có Zustand cart store/action `addItem` và right cart placeholder có feedback thấy được (ví dụ tổng/đếm hoặc temporary list) đủ để test add-to-cart; không implement discount/quantity/remove/checkout ngoài phạm vi nếu chưa cần.
10. **Loading/empty edge states:** Given modal đang load menu data hoặc optionGroupIds chưa resolve được từ Dexie, when developer test, then hiển thị skeleton/loading state thay vì empty modal; nếu group/option inactive/missing, bỏ qua option không hợp lệ và không crash, đồng thời giữ CTA disabled nếu required group không thể thỏa.
11. **Regression gates:** Required frontend gates pass and are recorded: `cd pos-web && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build`; regression scan vẫn đảm bảo không dùng `localStorage`/`sessionStorage` cho token và không dùng `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`.

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [x] Inspect and preserve existing POS/menu implementation (AC: 1,8,9)
  - [x] Read `pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-shell.tsx`, `features/menu/hooks.ts`, `features/menu/components/product-tile.tsx`, `db/schemas/menu.ts`, and `shared/components/ui/dialog.tsx` before editing.
  - [x] Replace Story 2.2 placeholder `selectedProductForOptions` status block with real modal wiring; preserve route alert, mobile unsupported message, two-column POS layout, search/category/product grid behavior, and right cart placeholder.
- [x] Add option data hooks/selectors (AC: 1,6,10)
  - [x] Add `useOptionGroupsForProduct(product)` or equivalent in `pos-web/src/features/menu/hooks.ts`, reading Dexie `optionGroups` + `options` by IDs and sorting by `sortOrder` then Vietnamese label/name.
  - [x] Filter inactive/missing records safely; do not query Dexie directly from generic shared components.
  - [x] Keep `features/menu` importing only `shared/` and `db/`; no `routes/` imports.
- [x] Build OptionChip component (AC: 3,4,5)
  - [x] Create `pos-web/src/features/menu/components/option-chip.tsx`.
  - [x] Use semantic button/role behavior with visible focus, touch target ≥44px, selected border + check icon/text, and price delta via existing `formatVnd()`.
  - [x] Support disabled/max-reached visual state without relying only on color.
- [x] Build OptionModal component (AC: 1–7,10)
  - [x] Create `pos-web/src/features/menu/components/option-modal.tsx` using existing Radix/shadcn Dialog primitive.
  - [x] Initialize draft state from `isDefault` options where valid; reset draft whenever opened for a different product.
  - [x] Implement single-select replacement and multi-select toggle with `minSelect/maxSelect` guardrails.
  - [x] Disable `Thêm vào giỏ` until required/min groups are satisfied; show helper text naming the first missing group.
  - [x] Add note textarea/input with `maxLength={200}` and placeholder `Ghi chú (tùy chọn)`.
  - [x] Keep price preview calculation pure and synchronous; use VND integer math only.
- [x] Add minimal cart store/add seam (AC: 8,9)
  - [x] Create `pos-web/src/features/orders/types.ts` or equivalent for `CartItem`/`CartItemOptionSnapshot` if absent.
  - [x] Create `pos-web/src/features/orders/cart-store.ts` or `shared/stores/cart.store.ts` only if architecture/story location demands; prefer `features/orders` for order/cart semantics and expose hook/action to route.
  - [x] Use UUID v7 (`uuidv7()` from `uuid` v11) for `tempId` if installed; otherwise add a tiny wrapper in `shared/lib/uuid.ts` aligned with architecture before use.
  - [x] `addItem` must store immutable snapshots (`productNameSnapshot`, `unitPriceSnapshot`, `labelSnapshot`, `priceDeltaSnapshot`) and `quantity: 1`.
  - [x] Update POS right placeholder enough to show item count/total or last added item so add-to-cart is visible and testable; defer full CartPanel line item editing to Story 2.4.
- [x] Wire ProductTile → OptionModal → cart add (AC: 1,8,9)
  - [x] Product with options opens modal; product without options can remain TODO/no-op unless implementing a shared `addProductToCart` helper is trivial and does not expand scope.
  - [x] On successful add, close modal and return focus to ProductTile through Radix Dialog/default focus behavior or explicit ref if needed.
- [x] Tests (AC: 1–11)
  - [x] Extend `pos-shell.test.tsx` or add component tests with fake IndexedDB seeded product, option groups, and options.
  - [x] Test modal opens from ProductTile, group order, required helper/disabled CTA, default option preselect, single-select replacement, multi-select max feedback, price delta preview, note max/placeholder, and snapshot passed to cart store.
  - [x] Test accessibility roles/labels for group and chips enough to catch radio/checkbox regressions.
  - [x] Test loading/missing option group does not crash and keeps invalid add disabled.
  - [x] Run and record full frontend gates plus token/XSS grep.

## Dev Notes

### Scope boundaries

- This story owns the café modifier interaction: OptionModal, OptionChip, option group validation, item note draft, item price preview, and the minimal cart add seam needed to prove snapshots are created.
- This story does **not** own full CartPanel line-item editing, quantity stepper, discount, checkout, local order building, sync engine, receipt, backend schema/API, or Admin CRUD. Those are Stories 2.4+ and Epic 3.
- Do not create backend endpoints. Option data must come from Story 2.1 Dexie menu cache (`optionGroups`, `options`) already populated by `/api/v1/menu/sync`.

### Current implementation state to preserve/read before coding

- `pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-shell.tsx` currently has Story 2.2 real product browsing plus a temporary `selectedProductForOptions` status message. Replace that placeholder with real `OptionModal` wiring, but preserve:
  - `routeMessage` alert from RoleGate/session routing.
  - mobile unsupported copy: `POS hoạt động tốt nhất ở màn hình ngang hoặc laptop/tablet`.
  - two-column layout and right cart placeholder.
  - `useCategories()`, `useProducts()`, debounced search, category navigation, empty/loading states.
- `pos-web/src/features/menu/components/product-tile.tsx` is pure and already emits `onSelect`; keep it pure. Do not import cart/Dexie directly into ProductTile.
- `pos-web/src/features/menu/hooks.ts` already wraps Dexie via `useLiveQuery`, sorts by `sortOrder` then Vietnamese locale name, filters active products, and normalizes Vietnamese search. Add option selectors here or nearby rather than duplicating query logic in components.
- `pos-web/src/db/schemas/menu.ts` defines `MenuOptionGroupRecord` with `optionIds` and `MenuOptionRecord` with `priceDeltaVnd`, `isDefault`, `sortOrder`. Use these exact names.
- `pos-web/src/shared/components/ui/dialog.tsx` already exists and wraps Radix Dialog. Prefer this over introducing a new modal primitive.
- `pos-web/src/shared/lib/format-vnd.ts` already exists. Use it for product base price, option delta, preview, and cart visible feedback.

### Architecture and guardrails

- Source of truth on conflict: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md` and `_bmad-output/project-context.md`.
- FE layering: `routes/` may import `features/` and `shared/`; `features/menu` may import `shared/` and `db`; order/cart semantics belong in `features/orders` or an explicitly shared store if it is generic. `shared/` must not import `features/`, `routes/`, or `db`.
- TypeScript strict; component filenames kebab-case; components PascalCase; hooks `use*` camelCase.
- VND money is integer only. Never use floats for price/line totals.
- Snapshot immutability starts here: once `CartItem` is built, use `productNameSnapshot`, `unitPriceSnapshot`, `labelSnapshot`, `priceDeltaSnapshot`; do not store live product/option names as the only source for cart display.
- Security regressions remain blockers: no token use in `localStorage`/`sessionStorage`, no `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`.
- UUID rule: architecture requires UUID v7 via `uuid` package v11+ (`uuidv7()`) for identifiers. If `tempId` is not a persisted order id, still prefer UUID v7 to avoid future refactor churn.

### UX/accessibility requirements

- OptionModal is the defining UX interaction for Café POS MVP. Optimize for speed, touch, and clarity under pressure.
- Touch targets: ProductTile already ≥48px; OptionChip must be ≥44px, preferably 48–56px.
- Required/selected/error state must not rely only on color. Use text, border, icon/check indicator, and helper copy.
- Dialog requirements: focus trap, clear heading, group labels, Esc close only when safe, focus return to ProductTile.
- Chip roles: `radio` for required single-select (`isRequired=true && maxSelect=1`), `checkbox` for multi-select (`maxSelect>1`). If using `<button>`, add explicit `role` + `aria-checked` and keyboard behavior consistent with button activation.
- Note input max 200 chars with visible/accessible label or placeholder; render note as text only.
- Loading should be local inside the modal, not a blocking app-wide overlay.

### Previous story intelligence

- Story 2.2 completed product grid/category/search and left a placeholder seam for Story 2.3. Keep its tests and behavior intact; previous review specifically fixed debounce determinism and empty-menu handling.
- Story 2.1 established Dexie as offline source of truth and `useLiveQuery` hooks. Continue to use Dexie cache for POS data; no direct API fetch on modal open.
- Story 1.9/2.2 preserved RoleGate route messages and POS shell responsive behavior. Do not regress these while wiring modal state.
- Recent backend fix in Story 2.2 touched `pos-api` auth/menu DI only; this story should be frontend-only unless tests reveal a real shared regression.

### File structure guidance

Expected files to add/update:

```text
pos-web/src/
├── routes/pos/
│   ├── pos-shell.tsx                 # UPDATE real OptionModal wiring + minimal cart feedback
│   └── pos-shell.test.tsx            # UPDATE integration tests
├── features/menu/
│   ├── hooks.ts                      # UPDATE option group/options selector(s)
│   └── components/
│       ├── option-modal.tsx          # NEW
│       ├── option-chip.tsx           # NEW
│       ├── product-tile.tsx          # UPDATE only if needed for focus/ref; keep pure
│       └── category-nav.tsx          # likely unchanged
├── features/orders/
│   ├── cart-store.ts                 # NEW minimal Zustand cart add seam
│   └── types.ts                      # NEW CartItem snapshot types
└── shared/lib/
    ├── format-vnd.ts                 # existing; reuse
    └── uuid.ts                       # NEW only if helpful wrapper around uuidv7()
```

### Testing Standards

- Use Vitest + React Testing Library.
- Use fake IndexedDB/Dexie seeding for POS integration where practical; mock hooks only for focused unit tests.
- Use fake timers only where debounce is involved; do not sleep real time.
- Required command set:

```bash
cd pos-web && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
```

- Regression scan command suggestion:

```bash
grep -R "localStorage\|sessionStorage\|dangerouslySetInnerHTML" -n pos-web/src --exclude='*.test.ts' --exclude='*.test.tsx'
```

### Completion Notes List

- Implemented OptionModal with Radix Dialog, sorted option groups/options from Dexie, required/min validation, max-select feedback, default selections, VND integer price preview, note capture, and add-to-cart snapshot creation.
- Added OptionChip with explicit radio/checkbox semantics, visible selected/check state, price delta text, focus/touch sizing, and max-reached affordance.
- Added minimal Zustand cart seam with UUID v7 temp IDs and POS right-panel count/subtotal/latest-item feedback for Story 2.4 handoff.
- Extended POS integration tests for modal open, ordering, required validation, defaults, single/multi selection, max feedback, note snapshot, cart store, and missing group safety.
- ✅ Resolved review finding [Patch]: Added `uuid` v11 dependency and replaced hand-rolled UUID v7 wrapper with `v7 as uuidv7` package usage for cart temp IDs.
- ✅ Resolved review finding [Patch]: Required/minSelect groups with too few resolved options now remain missing/invalid, keeping Add CTA disabled with helper feedback.
- ✅ Resolved review finding [Patch]: Option group/option selector now defensively skips cached inactive records via `isActive !== false`; Dexie menu option/group types allow optional `isActive` for forward-compatible cache data.
- ✅ Fix loop: Removed the unnecessary `resetKey` dependency warning/root cause in OptionModal by making open/reset state explicit without synchronous effect state writes.
- ✅ Fix loop: Stabilized full-suite App route coverage by isolating admin shell route rendering and preventing document navigation from admin links/root brand link during tests; full suite passes.
- ⚠️ Radix Dialog/RTL act warnings remain visible in POS modal tests, but they are non-blocking warnings and all assertions/gates pass.

## QA Results

### Review Findings

- [x] [Review][Patch] UUID v7 dependency requirement not satisfied [pos-web/src/shared/lib/uuid.ts:1] — Story/architecture requires UUID v7 via the `uuid` package v11 (`uuidv7()`), but `package.json` has no `uuid` dependency and the implementation adds a hand-rolled UUID generator. Fix by adding `uuid` v11 and using `v7 as uuidv7` (or equivalent wrapper) for `CartItem.tempId`.
- [x] [Review][Patch] Required groups with missing/unresolved options can be added after another required group is satisfied [pos-web/src/features/menu/components/option-modal.tsx:31] — `missingGroup()` only reports groups with `options.length >= minimum`, so a required/minSelect group whose options failed to resolve is skipped; once all satisfiable required groups are selected, `firstMissingGroup` becomes undefined and `canAdd` can turn true. AC10 requires CTA remain disabled if a required group cannot be satisfied. Treat unsatisfiable required/min groups as missing for validation/helper purposes.
- [x] [Review][Patch] Inactive option groups/options are not filtered before rendering or snapshotting [pos-web/src/features/menu/hooks.ts:57] — AC10 says inactive/missing group/option records must be skipped safely. The selector filters missing records but does not filter inactive records if cached/menu-sync data contains them. Add defensive `isActive !== false` filtering for option groups/options (or align schema/types if inactive is intentionally absent from current cache shape).
